name: Aqua Metals, Inc.
summary: PARTI Background Aqua Metals was incorporated in Delaware on June 20, 2014, to develop and commercialize metals recycling technologies based on its proprietary AquaRefining process. In 2015, the Company developed its initial AquaRefining technology for lead-acid battery recycling, and between 2017 and 2019 operated a demonstration facility that achieved sustained production of recycled lead using a smelterless process. In 2021, the Company expanded its focus to lithium-ion battery recycling foll...
